description: Allowlist for local command presets. The LLM may request a preset by name, but must not construct arbitrary shell commands.

command_presets.name: python_compile_all
command_presets.description: Compile-check every Python file below the current working directory.

command_presets.name: python_test_pytest
command_presets.description: Run pytest as the Python verification step when the project has pytest tests.

command_presets.name: python_exception_smoke
command_presets.description: Run pytest in fail-fast mode to surface the first exception traceback quickly.

command_presets.name: java_compile_src
command_presets.description: Compile Java source files under src with javac. Intended for simple non-Gradle Java projects.
command_presets.notes: Create sources.txt with the project source list before enabling this preset.

command_presets.name: java_exception_smoke
command_presets.description: Run a configured Java main class and capture thrown exceptions.
command_presets.notes: Replace Main with the project entry class before enabling this preset.

command_presets.name: gradlew_compile
command_presets.description: Compile/build a Gradle project through the checked-in Windows Gradle wrapper.

command_presets.name: gradlew_compile_unix
command_presets.description: Compile/build a Gradle project through the checked-in Unix Gradle wrapper.

command_presets.name: gradlew_test_fail_fast
command_presets.description: Run Gradle tests and capture the first useful exception or assertion failure output.

command_presets.name: gradlew_test_fail_fast_unix
command_presets.description: Run Gradle tests through the Unix wrapper and capture exception output.

command_presets.name: cpp_cmake_configure
command_presets.description: Configure a CMake C/C++ project into the normal build directory.

command_presets.name: cpp_cmake_build
command_presets.description: Build the normal CMake build directory.

command_presets.name: cpp_ctest
command_presets.description: Run CTest from the normal CMake build directory with failing test output.

command_presets.name: cpp_cmake_clean_build
command_presets.description: Build the normal CMake build directory after invoking the generator clean target first.
command_presets.notes: Use when stale object files are suspected. This does not remove the build directory or CMake cache.

command_presets.name: cpp_cmake_configure_fresh
command_presets.description: Configure a CMake C/C++ project into a separate fresh agent build directory without deleting existing builds.
command_presets.notes: Use after repeated suspicious failures from the normal build directory.

command_presets.name: cpp_cmake_build_fresh
command_presets.description: Build the separate fresh agent CMake build directory.

command_presets.name: cpp_ctest_fresh
command_presets.description: Run CTest from the separate fresh agent CMake build directory.

compile_fix_loop: Run an allowed compile preset first.
Read stdout and stderr from that preset.
Fix only files directly implicated by compiler errors or exception stack traces.
Run the same compile preset again after edits.
Stop after repeated identical errors or when no allowed preset applies.
cmake_stale_build_loop: For CMake projects, start with cpp_cmake_configure, cpp_cmake_build, and cpp_ctest.
If stale object files are suspected, run cpp_cmake_clean_build before editing unrelated code.
If stale CMake cache or generated files are suspected, use cpp_cmake_configure_fresh, cpp_cmake_build_fresh, and cpp_ctest_fresh.
Do not delete build directories unless the user adds and approves an explicit preset for that action.
exception_monitor_loop: Run an allowed exception_monitor preset when runtime exceptions are suspected.
Prefer the shortest fail-fast preset that surfaces a traceback or stack trace.
Do not invent new commands; ask the user to add a preset when coverage is missing.
